membership_plans.description: Most popular annual membership with full indoor pistol access and limited rifle range access.
membership_plans.guest_pass_description: 2 complimentary guest passes per month, valid for indoor pistol lanes.

membership_plans.name: Family Annual
membership_plans.description: Annual membership covering up to two adults and two juniors with full range access.
membership_plans.guest_pass_description: 4 guest passes per month, valid on any range when accompanied by a primary member.

membership_plans.name: Pistol Only Annual
membership_plans.description: Annual membership with unlimited indoor pistol range access. No rifle or shotgun privileges.
membership_plans.guest_pass_description: 1 guest pass per month for indoor pistol range.

membership_plans.name: Premium All-Access Annual
membership_plans.description: Top-tier annual membership with priority lane booking, lockers, and unlimited guest privileges on all ranges.
membership_plans.guest_pass_description: Unlimited guest passes (guests must share a lane with the member).

membership_plans.name: Rifle Only Monthly
membership_plans.description: Monthly membership with access to outdoor rifle ranges only.
membership_plans.guest_pass_description: Guest passes not included with this plan.

membership_plans.name: Shotgun Sports Quarterly
membership_plans.description: Quarterly membership for trap, skeet, and sporting clays shooters.
membership_plans.guest_pass_description: 2 guest passes per quarter for shotgun fields only.

range_rules.title: Eye and Ear Protection
range_rules.content: Approved eye and ear protection must be worn at all times while on any active firing line, regardless of whether you are shooting or observing.

range_rules.title: Firearm Handling
range_rules.content: All firearms must be treated as if they are loaded at all times. Never point a firearm at anything you are not willing to destroy.

range_rules.title: Muzzle Direction
range_rules.content: Keep your muzzle pointed downrange at all times. Do not allow the muzzle to cross any person on or behind the firing line.

range_rules.title: Range Commands
range_rules.content: All shooters must immediately obey range officer commands. Failure to comply may result in removal from the range.

range_rules.title: Cease Fire Procedures
range_rules.content: On the command 'Cease Fire', immediately stop shooting, keep the muzzle pointed downrange, remove your finger from the trigger, and await further instructions.

range_rules.title: Ammunition Restrictions
range_rules.content: Armor-piercing, tracer, and incendiary ammunition are strictly prohibited on all ranges.

range_rules.title: Target Placement
range_rules.content: Targets must be placed at heights that ensure rounds impact the berm or designated backstop. Ground or sky shots are not permitted.

range_rules.title: Courtesy and Conduct
range_rules.content: Be courteous to other shooters. Use appropriate language and avoid distracting others while they are shooting.

range_rules.title: Clean Up Brass and Trash
range_rules.content: Shooters are responsible for cleaning up their brass, targets, and trash before leaving the firing line.

courses.title: Basic Handgun Safety – Saturday Morning
courses.description: Entry-level Basic Handgun Safety class covering safe handling, range commands, loading/unloading, and live-fire fundamentals. Designed for new handgun owners.

courses.title: Basic Handgun Safety – Sunday Morning
courses.description: Comprehensive Basic Handgun Safety course emphasizing safe operation, stance, grip, and trigger control with extended range time.

courses.description: Afternoon Basic Handgun Safety session for those who cannot attend morning classes. Includes classroom and live-fire portions.

courses.description: Condensed evening Basic Handgun Safety course covering all core safety topics and a shorter live-fire block.

courses.title: Junior Program: Intro to Marksmanship (Saturday Morning)
courses.description: Junior-focused safety and fundamentals class for new shooters ages 10–17. Covers range rules, safe gun handling, and basic marksmanship with .22 LR rifles.

courses.description: Intermediate class for juniors preparing for local matches. Focuses on match procedures, scoring, and performance drills.

courses.description: Half-day junior camp session emphasizing safe gun handling, group shooting, and fun skills games.

courses.title: Intermediate Rifle Marksman Clinic
courses.description: Intermediate-level rifle clinic focusing on prone, sitting, and kneeling positions at 100–200 m with coaching on natural point of aim and wind calls.

courses.description: Women-only handgun safety and skills development class. Covers fundamental safety rules, safe storage, and live-fire practice.

courses.title: Range Safety Officer Certification – Full Day
courses.description: Advanced course for experienced shooters who wish to become certified Range Safety Officers. Includes classroom work, written test, and practical evaluation.

courses.description: Basic handgun safety and fundamentals with an emphasis on building confidence for new shooters.
